assertions.assertion: Shows AddUserAccessTokenHttpClient for the named HttpClient pattern with automatic token attachment
assertions.rationale: Uses generic AddHttpClient, not AddUserAccessTokenHttpClient — no automatic token management

assertions.assertion: Shows GetUserAccessTokenAsync for the manual pattern
assertions.rationale: Uses GetTokenAsync("access_token") instead of GetUserAccessTokenAsync — misses the BFF/ATM integration that handles automatic refresh

assertions.assertion: Both API endpoints use .AsBffApiEndpoint() for CSRF protection
assertions.rationale: .AsBffApiEndpoint() is not used on either endpoint — missing CSRF protection

assertions.assertion: Does NOT return the raw access token to the browser (no Results.Json with the token value)
assertions.rationale: Returns the remote response, not the token

assertions.assertion: Mentions that token refresh is handled automatically by AccessTokenManagement
assertions.rationale: No mention of automatic token refresh or AccessTokenManagement
